name: academic_relation_mining
description: Search papers and analyze relation graph with web-discussion evidence.
examples: 查询 RAG benchmark 论文关系并联动网上讨论
对比两篇论文的引用网络和观点冲突

phases.title: Intent Resolve
phases.goal: 明确论文主题、关系图和引用范围

phases.title: Compile & Lint
phases.goal: dry-run 检查 workflow 与变量注入

phases.title: Execute
phases.goal: 执行论文检索+关系挖掘并输出 references

phases.title: Cross Verify
phases.goal: 检查引用覆盖度与关系边质量
